form.formComment: Last start finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 10 over 320m at this track behind Airflow Betty beaten 10 lengths (19.37). Some good form is emerging from that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, The latest effort was a 17 length seventh over 401m at this track. Prefer in something easier.
